---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or workflow enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Helps

Explain how this improves speed, clarity, reliability, or maintainability.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, or examples if helpful.
